meanings.definition: the act of giving a false appearance
make believe with the intent to deceive
examples: He feigned that he was ill

meanings.definition: put forward a claim and assert right or possession of
put forward, of a guess, in spite of possible refutation
examples: I am guessing that the price of real estate will rise again
I cannot pretend to say that you are wrong

meanings.definition: represent fictitiously, as in a play, or pretend to be or act like

examples: He professed innocence but later admitted his guilt
She pretended not to have known the suicide bomber
She pretends to be an expert on wine
